InstructionData.Title: Passive Cooler v0.1
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
# Title alias dTank d0 alias dPAStorage d1 alias dPACoolLoop d2 alias dVPLoopInput d3 alias dVPLoopOutput d4 alias dDS d5
RESET: s dVPLoopInput On 0 #Stop both pumps s dVPLoopOutput On 0 #Stop both pumps
CHECKDS: l r1 dDS Activate bne r1 r2 DECIDE # status has changed j CHECKDS # else return
DECIDE: beq r1 1 DAYTIME beq r1 0 NIGHTTIME j RESET # error handling
DAYTIME: move r2 r1 l r3 dPAStorage Pressure # read loop pressure bgt r3 15000 RESET # stop if overpressure s dVPLoopOutput On 1 # start pump j CHECKDS
NIGHTTIME: move r2 r1 l r4 dPACoolLoop Pressure # read loop pressure bgt r4 15000 RESET # stop if overpressure s dVPLoopInput On 1 # start pump j CHECKDS
EOF:
